item.name: Broken Object Level Authorization - Use Another Patient ID
Broken Object Property Level Authorization - Inject Unauthorized Property
Broken Function Level Authorization - Use Invalid Token
Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows - Submit Special Characters & SQL Injection

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": "{{patient_id}}",
  "patientName": "Robert'); DROP TABLE Patients;--",
  "gender": "male<script>alert('x')</script>",
  "dateOfBirth": "1990-01-01",
  "bloodGroup": "O+",
  "doctorId": "{{doctor_id}}",
  "doctorName": "Dr. Evil",
  "department": "Oncology",
  "reportDate": "2024-06-12",
  "reportType": "Annual Checkup",
  "diagnosisSummary": "Healthy",
  "weight": -9999999999,
  "height": 9999999999,
  "pulseRate": 0,
  "bloodPressureSystolic": -120,
  "bloodPressureDiastolic": 999999,
  "bodyTemperature": "NaN",
  "prescribedMedications": "<script>alert('med')</script>",
  "lifestyleAdvice": "' OR '1'='1",
  "createdAt": "2024-06-12T12:00:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "2024-06-12T12:05:00Z"
}
